title: Rule and cleanup — sk-code §4 + Bucket-A sweep
description: Added the canonical no-ephemeral-artifact-pointers rule to sk-code §4 (universal + both surfaces), aggressively revised the contradicting OpenCode §4 guidance, and ran a comments-only cleanup of ~135 Bucket-A sites across deep-agent-improvement, system-code-graph, system-skill-advisor, and system-spec-kit. All four skills' suites passed post-cleanup.
